title: An Account of)'Ali b. Muhammad b. 'Abd al-Rahim 's) Expedition and What Determined Him to Revolt There
description: An Account of)'Ali b. Muhammad b. 'Abd al-Rahim 's) Expedition and What Determined Him to Revolt There. Recorded under the year 256 AH (870–887 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 36.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 36
